chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Which of the following selections is the final gear in the figure?
options: Single reduction bevel gear type final gear
Single reduction spur (cylindrical) gear type final gear
Double reduction center type final gear
Double reduction side type final gear
answer: Single reduction bevel gear type final gear
note: Câu phụ thuộc vào hình final gear. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Regarding the advantages of the hypoid gear, which of the following statements is not true?
options: Has a higher gear ratio and contact ratio than a spiral bevel gear of the same size.
Minimize noise level at high speed.
Can help lower the vehicle's center of gravity while keeping the ground clearance.
Low cost.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Regarding the disadvantages of the hypoid gear, which of the following statements is not true?
options: Complicated manufacturing, requiring high assembly accuracy.
The longitudinal sliding along the tooth length in the meshing area increase.
Requires special lubricating oil
Does not help lower the vehicle's center of gravity.
answer: Does not help lower the vehicle's center of gravity.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Through the layout of bearings, it is possible to evaluate which final gear in the figure has the greatest torque transmission capacity?
options: Left figure
Middle figure
Right figure
Both middle and right figure
note: Câu phụ thuộc vào hình bố trí ổ bi/bearing layout. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Regarding the final gear, which of the following statements is not true?
options: The pinion gear of the FR vehicle is usually arranged in cantilever beam type.
Pairs of two tapered roller bearings are usually arranged in an O letter-shape for better rigidity of the shaft.
The double reduction final gear is designed for a large gear ratio with little impact on ground clearance.
The double reduction final gear has center type and side type.
answer: Pairs of two tapered roller bearings are usually arranged in an O letter-shape for better rigidity of the shaft.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Regarding the functions of differential, which of the following statements is not true?
options: The differential is used to transmit torque to the drive wheels.
The differential is used to distribute torque to the drive wheels.
The differential is used to change the torque before it is transmitted to the drive wheels.
The differential ensures that the drive wheels can rotate at different speeds.
answer: The differential is used to change the torque before it is transmitted to the drive wheels.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Find the incorrect sentence in the following sentences? Bevel gear type final gears for FR vehicles are usually constructed to:
options: Be able to adjust the preload of bearing.
Be able to adjust the backlash between pinion gear and ring gear.
Be able to adjust the vehicle's ground clearance.
Be able to adjust the tooth contact pattern.
answer: Be able to adjust the vehicle's ground clearance.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: In the final gear and differential unit, which of the following part meshing with the ring gear?
options: Planetary gear.
Differential case.
Side gear.
Pinion gear.

question: In the final gear and differential unit of FR vehicle, which of the following part meshing with the pinion gear?

Side gear.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Which the following part constructed the final gear and differential of the FR vehicle, is directly related to the speed distribution operation.
options: Driven gear (ring gear).
Final gear housing.
Side gear.
Driving gear (pinion gear).
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Talking about full floating rear axle shaft, which of the following sentences is incorrect?
options: Normally, used for heavy trucks and buses.
Its construction make vehicle can support heavy load.
Rear axle shaft can be removed from axle housing without disassembly wheel.
Rear axle shaft both transmits torque to the drive wheels and support the load of vehicle.
answer: Rear axle shaft both transmits torque to the drive wheels and support the load of vehicle.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: The following figure shows differential construction with locking differential, find the incorrect statement in the following sentences?
options: When the one side drive wheel is spined, the differential must be locking differential.
Locking operation is possible when the wheels have come to a complete stop.
When locking, the driver act the differential lever, the lock shift lever 3 push the sliding sleeve 5 into the teething ring 6 to lock the differential.
There is usually no locking differential indicator on the dashboard, so remember to unlock it after use.
answer: There is usually no locking differential indicator on the dashboard, so remember to unlock it after use.
note: Câu có hình locking differential và option có nhắc các chi tiết số 3, 5, 6. Nên tạo ảnh thủ công. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Choose a proper name for the axle shaft in figure a, b, c?
note: Câu matching/matrix dựa trên hình a, b, c. Cần ảnh thủ công để người học phân biệt loại axle shaft.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Talking about semi floating axle shaft, which of the following sentences is correct?
options: Normally, used for heavy trucks and buses.
In terms of construction, it is possible to make the vehicle withstand a bigger load than the fully floating axle shaft.
There is only one supporting bearing between the axle shaft and the axle housing.
Axle shaft transmits torque to the drive wheel and support only a part of the vehicle's load.
answer: There is only one supporting bearing between the axle shaft and the axle housing.
note: Mình lấy đáp án theo file Postest mới: option này có x ở cuối. File PDF gốc/Pretest có dấu chọn khác gây nhiễu, nhưng theo lưu ý của bạn, dấu x trong file mới là đáp án đúng.

chapter: Chapter 6: Final gear, differential and axle shaft
question: Talking about full floating axle shaft, which of the following sentences is incorrect?
options: Normally, used for heavy trucks and buses.
In terms of construction, it is possible to make the vehicle withstand a bigger load than other axle shaft.
The axle shaft can be pulled out without jacking up the axle or removing the wheels.
The end of axle shaft mounted with the hub has one supporting bearing.
answer: The end of axle shaft mounted with the hub has one supporting bearing.
note: Câu text-only xử lý được. Đáp án được xác nhận bằng dấu x trong Pretest/Postest.
